narration: What happens when one predator disappears?
visual_description: Hook visual: What happens when one predator disappears?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What happens when one predator disappears?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What happens when one predator disappears?

narration: Meet the mesopredator—smaller predators like foxes and raccoons—who thrive when larger predators vanish.
visual_description: Context visual: Meet the mesopredator—smaller predators like foxes and raccoons—who thrive when larger predators vanish.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Meet the mesopredator—smaller predators like foxes and raccoons—who thrive when larger predators vanish.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Meet the mesopredator—smaller predators like foxes and raccoons—who thrive when larger predators vanish.

narration: This shift can lead to overpopulation, impacting local ecosystems in unexpected ways.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This shift can lead to overpopulation, impacting local ecosystems in unexpected ways.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This shift can lead to overpopulation, impacting local ecosystems in unexpected ways.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This shift can lead to overpopulation, impacting local ecosystems in unexpected ways.

narration: Studies indicate that mesopredator release alters prey dynamics, causing a ripple effect on biodiversity.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies indicate that mesopredator release alters prey dynamics, causing a ripple effect on biodiversity.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies indicate that mesopredator release alters prey dynamics, causing a ripple effect on biodiversity.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies indicate that mesopredator release alters prey dynamics, causing a ripple effect on biodiversity.

narration: But here’s the catch—effects can vary widely. Not all ecosystems respond the same way.
